About Me

A 360° marketer with luxury at heart

I am a marketing professional with a real love for luxury, fashion, and fragrance. I have lived and worked in India, Spain, and France, which has given me a genuinely international perspective on how brands resonate across different audiences.

My experience is unusually broad. I have worked on brand strategy, content, SEO, influencer marketing, e-commerce, analytics, campaign management, and visual merchandising. This means I can move between the creative and analytical sides of marketing comfortably, which is rare in a single hire.

I first entered the fragrance world at Bon Parfumeur, working on the brand's digital presence, editorial content, and Shopify store. At Globe Groupe I moved into Travel Retail across EMEA, where I managed campaigns, built reporting dashboards in Power BI, and coordinated teams across multiple markets.

I am highly adaptable and a rapid learner - I consistently hit the ground running, absorbing environments at speed and excelling well ahead of the curve. Currently progressing in French (B1) as part of my full commitment to the Parisian professional world.

🔄
360° Marketer
SEO, influencer work, KPI dashboards, merchandising. Comfortable owning the full marketing mix rather than a single channel.

Ongoing
With SKEMA Faculty · Paris
Programme Grande École

M1 - SKEMA's flagship MIM

Before specialising in luxury, I completed SKEMA Business School's Programme Grande École (PGE), a Master in Management, on the Paris campus. The PGE is one of France's most established graduate qualifications and the same path many of the country's senior business leaders have taken.

Recognised by the Conférence des Grandes Écoles and triple-accredited (AACSB, EQUIS, AMBA), the PGE opens far beyond luxury, into finance, consulting, tech, FMCG, and international management, making it a versatile foundation for any senior business role across Europe.
International Business & StrategyCore Track
Management, Marketing & FinancePGE Foundation
Conférence des Grandes ÉcolesRecognised Degree
Luxury MBA Spotlight

SKEMA - Luxury & Fashion Management

SKEMA's M2 in Luxury & Fashion Management is one of the most respected programmes in Europe for the luxury industry. It is based in Sophia Antipolis on the French Riviera, SKEMA's main luxury campus, and gave me direct exposure to the houses, ateliers, and executives shaping the industry today.

The programme shaped how I think about brand strategy, retail experience design, and the storytelling at the heart of luxury. It is the foundation underneath every campaign and decision I work on today.
Brand Strategy & Luxury HeritageSpecialisation

Featured Work

Selected projects & achievements

Featured Thesis
2023 · SKEMA M2 Thesis
Current Market Trends in the Diamond Industry
My Master's thesis at SKEMA, using a mixed-methods approach to study the luxury diamond sector. It covers lab-grown diamonds, sustainable sourcing, blockchain transparency, the impact of COVID-19, the growth of online luxury retail, and CSR trends.
Market ResearchLuxury StrategySustainabilityMixed-Methods
2024 - 2025 · EMEA
Globe Groupe - EMEA Travel Retail Reporting
Built and maintained live Power BI dashboards tracking campaign KPIs across EMEA airport hubs. Coordinated international teams to deliver travel retail activations on schedule.
Power BIEMEATravel Retail

Bon Parfumeur - Digital Brand Identity
Worked on the brand's digital identity through editorial content, influencer campaigns, and Shopify optimisation. Wrote SEO-driven blog content in HTML that contributed to organic traffic growth.

Passions & lifestyle

👗
Fashion & Style
A real, long-standing passion. Runway shows, brand narratives, and seasonal trends are how I think about the world.

Drawn to museums, galleries, and the visual language of luxury. A real eye for beauty in everyday things.
